title: The Wedding Trap Is Set
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Katakuri, Capone Bege, Nami, Pedro, Big Mom Pirates, Sanji as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji... the hell is he doing? He's floundering around.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even for people like us, you can't just leave us behind and run.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I resent the name 'insmoke... I've lived with shameful this time...'

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But seeing you, who has grown so much

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because conscience" still remains in our family's blood.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is "gang" Bege doing !!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 22 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
